title: Competitor Pricing Page
description: Extracted structure for a vendor pricing page. Use with `firecrawl scrape --schema-file` or `firecrawl agent` when scraping any competitor's /pricing URL.

product_name.description: Name of the product or platform being priced (e.g., 'Restaurant365', '7shifts').

pricing_model.description: Primary pricing model. Use 'quote_only' when the page says 'contact sales' with no visible prices.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., 'USD', 'GBP', 'EUR'). Defaults to USD if unspecified on page.

tiers.description: Published plan tiers. Empty array if pricing is quote-only.

price.description: Price value, or 'custom' / 'contact sales' string if not published.

user_or_location_cap.description: Any cap stated (e.g., 'up to 10 employees', 'single location', or null if none).

included_features.description: Features listed as included in this tier.

excluded_features.description: Features explicitly called out as NOT included (often in comparison tables).

add_ons.description: Paid add-on modules beyond the base tier.

notes.description: Any qualifying detail (e.g., '+ $6 per employee paid').

contact_required.description: True if the page requires a sales conversation to get any price (no self-serve checkout).

last_observed_date.description: Date the page was scraped (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Used to flag stale data.
